architecture.description: Cross-platform UI test observability framework. Light annotations on UI controls (data-probe-* HTML attributes, ProbeWidget wrappers, .probeId() modifiers, attached properties) plus a runtime collector injected at test time that exposes a structured query API. The shared spec defines the canonical ProbeElement model (15 attributes, 9 ProbeTypes, 6 linkage path types) which each platform SDK implements natively. Integration packages bridge SDKs to test frameworks (Playwright, XCTest, Compose Test, Detox, etc.).
key_decisions: Shared spec (TypeScript types + JSON Schema) is the single source of truth
Per-platform SDK adapters implement the same ProbeElement model in native idioms
Two-layer architecture: annotation layer (data-probe-*, ProbeWidget, .probeId()) + runtime collector layer
6 composable primitives: Element Registry, State Exposure, Event Stream, Source Binding, Layout Metrics, Action Dispatch
Zero-mock testing philosophy: all tests connect to real dependencies
Smart pre-checks on every action: exists, visible, enabled, not busy
Hierarchy-aware visibility via ancestor chain walking
Platform matrix testing via runAcrossDevices() with device presets
Windows SDK split into 4 projects: shared core + WPF/WinForms/WinUI adapters

modules.description: Platform-agnostic specification. Defines ProbeElement (15 attributes), UITestProbe interface (all 6 primitives + hierarchy + platform), 9 ProbeTypes, 6 LinkagePath types, ProbeSnapshot/Diff, DeviceProfile presets. JSON Schema for element model and API request/response protocol.

Reference implementation of the full UITestProbe interface for web browsers. AnnotationParser reads data-probe-* HTML attributes; ElementRegistry uses MutationObserver for live DOM scanning; StateObserver watches data-probe-state attribute mutations; EventStream provides typed pub/sub with history buffer; SourceTracker intercepts fetch()/XHR and correlates to probe sources; LayoutTracker uses IntersectionObserver + PerformanceObserver; ActionDispatcher dispatches real DOM events with smart pre-checks and linkage verification. Exposes as window.__probe__ via IIFE bundle for Playwright injection.

Flutter SDK. ProbeWidget wrapper attaches metadata via Semantics nodes. ProbeBinding extends WidgetsFlutterBinding to scan widget tree and build registry. StateObserver uses persistent frame callbacks to diff state maps. SourceTracker wraps HttpOverrides to intercept all HTTP requests. ActionDispatcher validates element state before delegating to WidgetTester.

iOS/macOS SDK. SwiftUI view modifiers (.probeId(), .probeType(), .probeState(), .probeSource(), .probeLinkage()) attach metadata via accessibility properties. ProbeRegistry scans UIView hierarchy parsing accessibility hints. ActionDispatcher uses UIControl.sendActions and accessibility APIs for tap/fill/select with full pre-checks and linkage verification.

Android SDK. Custom SemanticsPropertyKeys (ProbeId, ProbeType, ProbeState, ProbeSource, ProbeLinkage) with Modifier extensions. ProbeRegistry walks the Compose SemanticsNode tree via a rootNodeProvider. ActionDispatcher uses ActionPerformer interface bridged to ComposeTestRule. Full linkage verification with coroutine-based timeout.

Shared Windows core. Complete ProbeElement record model with all 15 attributes + all sub-records (StateInfo, DataInfo, SourceInfo, LinkageInfo, LayoutInfo, etc.), 6 LinkagePath variants as abstract record hierarchy. IProbeRegistry interface. ActionDispatcherBase with full pre-flight checks, actAndWait with polling, and verifyLinkage with direct/chained/API effect tracking. AnnotationParser for string-based annotation formats.

WPF adapter. Probe DependencyProperty attached properties for XAML annotation. WpfProbeRegistry walks VisualTreeHelper, builds ProbeElements with layout from UIElement.RenderSize/TranslatePoint, refresh-on-query pattern. Wildcard pattern matching for children. IsEffectivelyVisible walks visual parent chain.

WinForms adapter. ProbeExtenderProvider IExtenderProvider for designer-time annotation. WinFormProbeRegistry discovers controls from provider, walks Control tree for parent assignment. Same refresh-on-query and wildcard children pattern.

MAUI/WinUI adapter. BindableProperty attached properties for XAML annotation. MauiProbeRegistry walks Layout/ContentView/ContentPage/ScrollView children. Same refresh-on-query, wildcard children, and IsEffectivelyVisible ancestor-walk pattern.

React Native SDK. useProbe() hook and withProbe() HOC serialize probe metadata into testID + accessibilityHint. Self-registration model (components register on mount). SourceTracker intercepts fetch/XHR with URL-pattern matching and event-driven waitForRequest. ActionDispatcher with full pre-flight checks, actAndWait, and linkage verification. RNProbe main class implements all 6 primitives.

Playwright integration. injectProbe() loads the pre-built IIFE bundle via page.addInitScript(). ProbePage wraps all 6 primitives + hierarchy + composite operations as typed page.evaluate() calls. Custom matchers: toHaveProbeState (with retry timeout), toHaveProbeData (deep partial match), toBeEffectivelyVisible.

Flutter test integration. ProbeTester extension on WidgetTester provides query(), queryAll(), waitForPageReady() (pumpAndSettle + state stability check), actAndWait() (taps finder then polls for state), setDevice() (adjusts surface size and pixel ratio), runAcrossDevices().

iOS XCTest integration. ProbeXCTest wraps XCUIApplication with query() (finds by accessibility identifier, parses hint metadata), queryAll(), waitForPageReady() (polls until no loading states and snapshot stable), actAndWait() (taps XCUIElement then polls), setDevice(). Extension on XCUIApplication provides .probe accessor.

Android Compose test integration. ProbeTestRule wraps ComposeTestRule, wires rootNodeProvider to semantics tree root, implements ActionPerformer using performClick/performTextInput. Provides query(), queryAll(), waitForPageReady() (polls for state stability), actAndWait(), setDevice(), runAcrossDevices(). hasProbeId() custom SemanticsMatcher.
WPF test driver. Wraps WpfProbeRegistry and WpfActionDispatcher for use in UI automation tests.
WinForms test driver. Wraps WinFormProbeRegistry and WinFormActionDispatcher for use in UI automation tests.
WinUI/MAUI test driver. Wraps MauiProbeRegistry and MauiActionDispatcher for use in UI automation tests. Larger implementation (329 lines) with full driver capabilities.

React Native Detox test integration. ProbeDevice wraps Detox device with query() (parses accessibilityHint JSON metadata), queryAll() (via executeScript bridge to RN probe), waitForPageReady(), waitForState(), actAndWait() (tap/type/fill/select/scroll), verifyLinkage(), isEffectivelyVisible(), setDevice(), runAcrossDevices(). createProbeDevice() factory.

CLI tool with 3 commands: instrument (scans source files across 8 frameworks, detects key controls, adds probe annotations with configurable ID strategies and dry-run mode), validate (checks for duplicate IDs, missing types, orphan linkage targets, circular linkage, unreachable elements), report (generates coverage reports in text/JSON/HTML with per-page and per-type breakdowns).

modules.language: Multi (TSX, Vue, Dart, Swift, Kotlin, C#, TypeScript)
modules.framework: Multi (React, Vue, Flutter, SwiftUI, Compose, MAUI, React Native)
modules.description: 7 platform example projects demonstrating the Order Management demo. Each includes an annotated OrderPage component and corresponding test file using the platform's integration package. Not runnable yet -- depend on SDK builds.

cross_cutting.type_flow: spec/probe-types.ts is the authoritative type source. sdk/web and sdk/react-native import it directly (same TS). sdk/flutter (probe_types.dart), sdk/ios (ProbeTypes.swift), sdk/android (ProbeTypes.kt), and sdk/windows-core (ProbeTypes.cs) have manually ported equivalents. Note: Flutter/iOS/Android use a simplified 7-type enum (control/display/input/navigation/container/media/feedback) vs the spec's 9-type enum -- this is a known divergence.
cross_cutting.dependency_graph: spec -> sdk/* -> integrations/* -> examples/*. Windows has additional: sdk/windows-core -> sdk/windows-wpf, sdk/windows-winform, sdk/windows-winui. integrations/playwright depends on sdk/web's IIFE bundle. integrations/detox depends on sdk/react-native types.
